description: Regidrago's main weakness in this Dragon-heavy meta is Ice; Aurorus as a Rock/Ice resists Ice and hits enemy Ice Pokémon super effectively with Rock Wrecker, cleanly covering the dragon's weakness.

sources.author: DanOttawaPOGO
sources.videoTitle: BEST RETRO CUP TEAMS | TOP RANKED POKÉMON | Pokémon GO Battle League

description: Lapras (Water/Ice) handles Ice threats, and pairing it with a free-roaming dragon like Goodra covers Lapras's own Ice weakness — the creator notes dragons pair well with everything since covering your Ice weakness with a dragon makes the pairing solid.

sources.author: DanOttawaPOGO
sources.videoTitle: BEST RETRO CUP TEAMS | TOP RANKED POKÉMON | Pokémon GO Battle League

description: Creator's stated formula of pairing a dragon with a water Pokémon — Kingdra is also half water, which helps, and Lapras adds bulk/water coverage. Together the dragon+water combo gives lots of neutral matchups.

sources.author: DanOttawaPOGO
sources.videoTitle: ABOMASNOW the COREBREAKER of RETRO CUP | Retro Cup Team | Pokemon GO Battle League

description: The Lapras + Regidrago core — considered the best two-Pokémon core in the cup. Add a third that beats Cresselia and Oranguru (e.g. Crustle with Rock Wrecker).

sources.author: YasserPoGO
sources.videoTitle: TOP TEAMS in the Retro Cup Great League | Pokemon GO PvP

description: The Regidrago + Oranguru core — buffed dragon damage with no steel/fairy to resist it, paired with buffed Confusion + Trailblaze Oranguru. Flex the third slot between Lapras (Ice Beam) and Cetitan/Celio (Powder Snow chip).

sources.author: YasserPoGO
sources.videoTitle: TOP TEAMS in the Retro Cup Great League | Pokemon GO PvP
